---
title: "Publications & Activities"
page-layout: full
toc: true
---

# Publications

My research focuses on **quantum information processing**, **quantum sensing**, **nitrogen-vacancy (NV) centers in diamond**, **quantum magnetic imaging**, and the development of experimental platforms for quantum technologies.

---

- **Quantum Imaging of Ferromagnetic van der Waals Magnetic Domain Structures at Ambient Conditions**

  Bindu*, **Amandeep Singh***, Amir Hen, Lukas Drago Čavar, Sebastian Maria Ulrich Schultheis, Israel Felner, Shira Yochelis, Yossi Paltiel, Andrew F. May, Angela Wittmann, Mathias Kläui, Dmitry Budker, Hadar Steinberg and Nir Bar-Gill.

  *ACS Applied Materials & Interfaces* **17**, 63956–63967 (2025)

  [Journal](https://pubs.acs.org/doi/10.1021/acsami.5c16352)

  *\*Equal contribution.*

---

- **Experimental quantum principal component analysis via parameterized quantum circuits**

  Tao Xin, Liangyu Che, Cheng Xi, **Amandeep Singh**, Xinfang Nie, Jun Li, Ying Dong and Dawei Lu.

  *Physical Review Letters* **126**, 110502 (2021)

  [Journal](https://doi.org/10.1103/PhysRevLett.126.110502)

---

- **Experimental Detection of Non-local Correlations using a Local Measurement-Based Hierarchy on an NMR Quantum Processor**

  **Amandeep Singh**, Kavita Dorai and Arvind.

  *European Physical Journal D* **74**, 168 (2020)

  [Journal](https://doi.org/10.1140/epjd/e2020-10173-9)

---

- **Simulating the Effect of Weak Measurements by a Phase Damping Channel and Determining Different Measures of Bipartite Correlations in Nuclear Magnetic Resonance**

  Akanksha Gautam, Varad R. Pande, **Amandeep Singh**, Kavita Dorai and Arvind.

  *Physics Letters A* **384**(30), 126760 (2020)

  [Journal](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.physleta.2020.126760)

---

- **Experimental Detection of Qubit–Ququart Pseudo-Bound Entanglement using Three Nuclear Spins**

  **Amandeep Singh**, Akanksha Gautam, Kavita Dorai and Arvind.

  *Physics Letters A* **383**(14), 1549–1554 (2019)

  [Journal](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.physleta.2019.02.027)

---

- **Experimentally Identifying the Entanglement Class of Pure Tripartite States**

  **Amandeep Singh**, Kavita Dorai and Arvind.

  *Quantum Information Processing* **17**, 334 (2018)

  [Journal](https://doi.org/10.1007/s11128-018-2105-5)

---

- **Experimental Classification of Entanglement in Arbitrary Three-Qubit Pure States on an NMR Quantum Information Processor**

  **Amandeep Singh**, Harpreet Singh, Kavita Dorai and Arvind.

  *Physical Review A* **98**, 032301 (2018)

  [Journal](https://journals.aps.org/pra/abstract/10.1103/PhysRevA.98.032301)

---

- **Experimental Demonstration of Selective Quantum Process Tomography on an NMR Quantum Information Processor**

  Akshay Gaikwad, Diksha Rehal, **Amandeep Singh**, Arvind and Kavita Dorai.

  *Physical Review A* **97**, 022311 (2018)

  [Journal](https://journals.aps.org/pra/abstract/10.1103/PhysRevA.97.022311)

---

- **Witnessing Nonclassical Correlations via a Single-Shot Experiment on an Ensemble of Spins using NMR**

  **Amandeep Singh**, Arvind and Kavita Dorai.

  *Physical Review A* **95**, 062318 (2017)

  [Journal](http://journals.aps.org/pra/abstract/10.1103/PhysRevA.95.062318)

---

- **Entanglement Detection on an NMR Quantum Information Processor using Random Local Measurements**

  **Amandeep Singh**, Arvind and Kavita Dorai.

  *Physical Review A* **94**, 062309 (2016)

  [Journal](http://journals.aps.org/pra/abstract/10.1103/PhysRevA.94.062309)

---

# PhD Thesis

- **Generation and Detection of Quantum Correlations and Entanglement on a Spin-Based Quantum Information Processor**

  Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Mohali (2019)

  [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/1905.06121)

---
# Scientific Activities


---

# Conferences, Research Visits & Workshops

- **MUQUABIS – Horizon Europe Project**, Berlin, Germany (10–12 Mar 2026)

  Delivered the invited talk *"Bioimaging and Sensing Using Solid State Defects"* during the **MUQUABIS 2nd Collaboration Meeting** at the **Max Born Institute for Nonlinear Optics and Short Pulse Spectroscopy (MBI)**.

  [Project](https://www.muquabis.eu/) ·
  [Meeting](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Xa2FG0O4guhIvKdSiTS1wzn3z5Wv8rbV/view?usp=sharing) ·
  [Presentation](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1plGygwnNUg5iCnzbuTQFsAHf9CKcl80O/edit?usp=drive_link&ouid=101270128518525601227&rtpof=true&sd=true)

---

- **Research Visitor**, Technical University of Munich, Munich, Germany (Aug 2025)

  Research visit to the laboratory of **Prof. Dominik Bucher**.

  [TUM](https://www.tum.de/en/) ·
  [Prof. Dominik Bucher](https://www.professoren.tum.de/en/bucher-dominik)

---

- **Research Visitor**, Helmholtz Institute Mainz, Germany (Aug 2025)

  Research visit to the laboratory of **Prof. Dmitry Budker**.

  [Helmholtz Institute Mainz](https://www.helmholtz-mainz.de/) ·
  [Prof. Dmitry Budker](https://budker.uni-mainz.de/)

---

- **QUIP Summer School on Quantum Sensing**, Mainz, Germany (17–22 Aug 2025)

  Johannes Gutenberg University Mainz.

  [Summer School](https://www.quantum-rlp.de/en/quip-summer-school-on-quantum-sensing-a-great-success-2/)

---

- **Research Visitor**, Helmholtz Institute Mainz, Germany (Jul 2024)

  Research visit to the laboratory of **Prof. Dmitry Budker**.

  [Helmholtz Institute Mainz](https://www.helmholtz-mainz.de/) ·
  [Prof. Dmitry Budker](https://budker.uni-mainz.de/)

---

- **MUQUABIS Collaboration Meeting**, Mainz, Germany (25–26 Jul 2024)

  Invited talk: *Quantum Magnetic Sensing*.

  [Project](https://sites.google.com/lens.unifi.it/muquabis-project/home?authuser=0) ·
  [Meeting](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1PI5sGJ8arlAfiWNRvpuwZtb8bm3m9NAm/view?usp=sharing) ·
  [Presentation](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1tneuL9Ifp1GtHwqowDXlykci__60qvM_/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=101270128518525601227&rtpof=true&sd=true)

---

- **International Magnetic Resonance Symposium**, Weizmann Institute of Science, Rehovot, Israel (4–5 Jun 2024)

  Poster: *Quantum Sensing and Imaging of van der Waals Ferromagnets using Nitrogen-Vacancy Centers.*

  [Conference](https://conferences.weizmann.ac.il/AIMRS2023/program) ·
  [Poster](https://drive.google.com/file/d/16Sx42eePYE__WOjwVbC4ehP_Jo6QaOUv/view)

---

- **Nano Center Annual Conference 2024**, Hebrew University of Jerusalem (1–2 May 2024)

  Poster: *Quantum Sensing and Imaging of van der Waals Ferromagnets using Nitrogen-Vacancy Centers.*

  [Conference](https://nano.huji.ac.il/event/nano-center-annual-conference-2024) ·
  [Poster](https://drive.google.com/file/d/16Sx42eePYE__WOjwVbC4ehP_Jo6QaOUv/view)

---

- **Research Visitor**, Helmholtz Institute Mainz, Germany (Mar 2024)

  Research visit to the laboratory of **Prof. Dmitry Budker**.

  [Helmholtz Institute Mainz](https://www.helmholtz-mainz.de/) ·
  [Prof. Dmitry Budker](https://budker.uni-mainz.de/)

---

- **Hasselt Diamond Workshop (SBDD XXVIII)**, Hasselt University, Belgium (28 Feb–1 Mar 2024)

  Poster: *Magnetic Domains Imaging of Ferromagnetic Fe₅GeTe₂ using Nitrogen Vacancy Defects in Diamond at Ambient Temperature.*

  [Workshop](https://www.uhasselt.be/en/events-en/recuring-events/hasselt-diamond-workshop-sbdd) ·
  [Poster](https://drive.google.com/file/d/16Sx42eePYE__WOjwVbC4ehP_Jo6QaOUv/view)

---

- **Hebrew University Quantum Center Annual Retreat**, Ashkelon, Israel (6–7 Sep 2023)

  [Retreat](https://qcent.huji.ac.il/event/quantum-center-annual-retreat-2023)

---

- **AMMCS 2019**, Wilfrid Laurier University, Waterloo, Canada (18–23 Aug 2019)

  Invited talk: *Experimental Detection of Qubit–Ququart Pseudo-Bound Entanglement using Three Nuclear Spins.*

  [Conference](https://ammcs.wlu.ca/2019/) ·
  [Presentation](https://drive.google.com/file/d/14oGzbwIgvLu013HzBZ5mR2wlXobV_T7-/view?usp=sharing)

---

- **APCWQIS 2018**, IISER Kolkata, India (19–23 Dec 2018)

  Poster: *Experimental Detection of Qubit–Ququart Pseudo-Bound Entanglement using Three Nuclear Spins.*

  [Conference](https://www.iiserkol.ac.in/~apcwqis2018/) ·
  [Poster](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1kSqsaAA_g20VB_TjZvBQOTFtdSLivkOS/view)

---

- **QIPA 2018**, Harish-Chandra Research Institute, India (2–8 Dec 2018)

  Poster: *Experimentally Identifying the Entanglement Class of Pure Tripartite States.*

  [Conference](https://www.hri.res.in/~confqic/qipa18/index.html) ·
  [Poster](https://doi.org/10.1007/s11128-018-2105-5)

---

- **DPSM-QFT 2018**, University of Cologne, Germany (21–23 Aug 2018)

  Poster: *Experimental Classification of Entanglement in Arbitrary Three-Qubit States.*

  [Poster](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xNG3EvRUC-HlUncHKNzqNYNaZCqbHnPb/view?usp=sharing)

---

- **QFF 2018**, Raman Research Institute, India (30 Apr–4 May 2018)

  [Conference](https://www.rri.res.in/~qff2018/menu.php) ·
  [Poster](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xNG3EvRUC-HlUncHKNzqNYNaZCqbHnPb/view?usp=sharing)

---

- **NMRS 2018**, IISER Mohali, India (16–19 Feb 2018)

  Poster: *Experimental Entanglement Detection of Unknown Tripartite States using Single Subsystem Measurements.*

  [Poster](https://sites.google.com/site/amandeepsidhuiiserm/)

---

- **Research Visitor**, Institute for Quantum Computing, University of Waterloo, Canada (Aug 2017)

  Research visit to the group of **Prof. Raymond Laflamme**.

---

- **CCIOS 2017**, Perimeter Institute, Waterloo, Canada (24–28 Jul 2017)

  [Conference](https://www2.perimeterinstitute.ca/conferences/contextuality-conceptual-issues-operational-signatures-and-applications) ·
  [Poster](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B6QyvwxCmPAkUktMSDd0XzE5OGs/view?usp=sharing)

---

- **APNMR 2017**, IISc Bangalore, India (16–19 Feb 2017)

  Invited talk: *Characterizing Quantum Correlations.*

  [Conference](https://www.iisc.ac.in/events/four-day-symposium-j-n-tata-auditorium/) ·
  [Presentation](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B6QyvwxCmPAkU1g5UDdFMnAwVlk/view?usp=drive_web)

---

- **NMRS 2016**, IIT Kharagpur, India (18–21 Feb 2016)

  [Conference](http://www.chemistry.iitkgp.ac.in/~nmrs/index.html) ·
  [Poster](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B6QyvwxCmPAkVUt1M0N4VGVnS1k/view?usp=drive_web)

---

- **NMRS 2015**, Guru Nanak Dev University, India (6–9 Mar 2015)

  [Poster](https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B6QyvwxCmPAkLXVrcW1la2l0d2s/view)

---

- **Meeting on Quantum Simulations (QS-2013)**, IISc Bangalore, India (2–3 Sep 2013)

---

# Professional Service

- Reviewer for **APS Physical Review** and **Physical Review Letters**.

- Mentor for Postdoctoral Fellows, Faculty of Sciences, Hebrew University of Jerusalem (Feb 2025–Present).

---

# Research Profiles

<div class="research-profiles">

<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-YKvXEYAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank">
<img src="../assets/icons/google-scholar.svg" alt="Google Scholar" width="28">
</a>

<a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-5170-6511" target="_blank">
<img src="../assets/icons/orcid.svg" alt="ORCID" width="28">
</a>

<a href="https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=57192386599" target="_blank">
<img src="../assets/icons/scopus.svg" alt="Scopus" width="28">
</a>

<a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Amandeep-Singh-46" target="_blank">
<img src="../assets/icons/researchgate.svg" alt="ResearchGate" width="28">
</a>

<a href="https://arxiv.org/a/singh_a_3.html" target="_blank">
<img src="../assets/icons/arxiv.svg" alt="arXiv" width="28">
</a>

<a href="https://github.com/AmandeepQLab" target="_blank">
<img src="../assets/icons/github.svg" alt="GitHub" width="28">
</a>

</div>
